# Let's open the provided file and inspect its content and length
path = "/mnt/data/file-JA7sj2LPiiH3RrEBk8zbFk-text_to_analyse.txt"
with open(path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    text = f.read()
len(text), text[:500]

# Find positions of double quotes in the text
positions = [i for i, ch in enumerate(text) if ch == '"']
len(positions), positions[:10], positions[-10:]

span1 = text[415:1078]
span2 = text[1361:len(text)]
print("Span1:", repr(span1[:80]), "...", len(span1))
print("Span2 start:", repr(span2[:80]))
print("Span2 end:", repr(span2[-80:]))

import json
spans = [
    {"span_start": 415, "span_end": 1078, "span_text": text[415:1078], "citation_type": "Aya"},
    {"span_start": 1361, "span_end": len(text), "span_text": text[1361:len(text)], "citation_type": "Aya"},
]
print(json.dumps({"citations": spans}, ensure_ascii=False))

content.text: {"citations":[{"span_start":415,"span_end":1078,"span_text":"And if they had only been patient and been mindful of the meeting with their Lord, they would have been better. And indeed, the dwellers of the Garden will be in security, and they will be in peace. But the dwellers of the Fire will be in distress, and they will be in a state of punishment. And they will say, 'Would that we had been with the people of the Book, and had not been with the people of the Fire!' But they will say, 'Indeed, we were wronged, and we were killed in the way of Allah.' And indeed, the dwellers of the Fire will be in the punishment of their Lord, and they will be in a state of disgrace.
